description: You are a Technical SEO Consultant auditing a client website for redirect issues before a planned site migration. The client has reported that some pages are loading slowly and suspects redirect chains are causing the problem. Using Screaming Frog SEO Spider, crawl https://crawler-test.com/ to investigate the redirect structure. Export the redirect response data (3xx URLs with their destination URLs and status codes) as a CSV to ~/Documents/SEO/exports/. Write a report at ~/Documents/SEO/reports/redirect_report.txt documenting the total count of redirecting URLs found, the number of redirect chains with 3 or more hops, the redirect status codes present (e.g., 301, 302, 307), and remediation recommendations for chains that should be consolidated. Login:
